prompt.role:
You are a senior full-stack architect. Your task is to produce a detailed, step-by-step WORKFLOW PLAN (not implementation code yet) for integrating a FastAPI chatbot backend with an existing React/Vite frontend for a multilingual healthcare triage application. The plan will be reviewed and validated by the human developer before any code is written by a separate model.
Output ONLY the workflow plan in the structured format described at the bottom of this prompt. Do NOT write any implementation code. Do NOT skip edge cases. Be precise about file paths, function names, and data shapes.

field.name: message
field.note: Must be in ENGLISH, max 4096 chars

field.name: hospital_info
field.note: Populated for clinic and emergency modes

chatbot_api.hospital_info_shape: name, address, distance_km, phone, open_now, lat, lng

emergency_api.note: This single API call handles BOTH ambulance call AND SMS. No separate SMS endpoint needed.
emergency_api.on_success: Show green success indicator in UI

tts_stt.functions_available: speechToText(audioBlob, langCode) → Promise<string> translateToEnglish(text, sarvamLangCode) → Promise<string> translateFromEnglish(text, sarvamLangCode) → Promise<string> textToSpeech(text, langCode) → Promise<Blob> playAudio(audioBlob) → Promise<void>
tts_stt.note: All functions already implemented in voiceUtils.js. Do NOT rewrite them.

user_context.location: lat/lng must be fetched fresh via browser Geolocation API at chat start — not stored in context

patient_id.note: Not yet implemented anywhere. Create patientId.js with getOrCreatePatientId() that reads from localStorage, creates if missing, and returns the string. Use this value as user_id in every chatbot API call.

session_id.lifecycle: Persist across page refreshes. Clear and generate new UUID only when user explicitly starts a new chat (e.g., navigates away and comes back after session_complete: true).

question_flow.note: The existing QUESTION_FLOW array in ChatBot.jsx (severity, additional_symptoms, duration, age_risk, comorbidity) MUST be kept exactly as-is. All questions must be displayed as text AND spoken aloud in voice mode. Questions must be shown in the user's selected language using the t() function. User answers (option clicks or typed text) are collected in symptomDataRef.

cors.fix: Add "http://localhost:5173" to CORS_ORIGINS list if not already present

behaviour_specification.flow: 1. On ChatBot.jsx mount: a. Call getOrCreatePatientId() → store as patientId constant b. Read session_id from localStorage key "aetrix_session_id". If missing or stale (session_complete was true in last session), generate new UUID and write to localStorage. c. Request browser Geolocation → store lat/lng in component state. If denied, lat/lng remain null (chatbot still works, no hospital list). d. Show greeting message (existing logic — keep as-is).

1. User types message → displayed in chat as-is (their language). 2. Message translated to English via translateToEnglish() before storing in symptomDataRef. 3. QUESTION_FLOW proceeds exactly as current code. 4. Each bot question: displayed as text in user's selected language (t() keys). 5. Voice mode is NOT active, so no TTS for bot questions.

1. User speaks → Sarvam STT → returns transcript in user's language (originalText). 2. translateToEnglish(originalText) → englishText stored in symptomDataRef. 3. originalText displayed in chat bubble. 4. Each bot question: a. Displayed as text in user's language (t() key). b. ALSO spoken aloud via speakIfVoiceMode() using Sarvam TTS. 5. Option buttons (severity, duration etc.) still shown — user can tap OR speak.

flow.name: CHATBOT API CALL — after question flow completes

behaviour_specification.flow: 1. Build structured English summary message from symptomDataRef: Format: "Patient symptoms: [symptoms joined by comma]. Severity: [symptom_severity]. Duration: [duration]. Age: [patient_age_risk or state.profile.age]. Gender: [state.profile.gender]. Comorbidities: [comorbidities or 'none']." 2. Show typing indicator. 3. POST to /api/chat with: { user_id: patientId, session_id, message: summaryMessage, lat, lng } 4. Persist response session_id back to localStorage. 5. Handle response by output_type (see below).

1. Translate response.message from English → user's language. 2. Display translated message as bot bubble. 3. If voice mode → TTS speak the translated message. 4. User replies (text or voice) → translate to English → POST to /api/chat with same session_id (multi-turn continues). 5. Repeat until session_complete: true or output_type changes.

1. Translate response.message + action_items from English → user's language. 2. Display as bot bubble. 3. If voice mode → TTS speak the translated message. 4. Session ends. No navigation. Conversation stops.

1. Translate response.message + action_items + disclaimer from English → user's language. 2. Display as bot bubble with action_items list below. 3. If voice mode → TTS speak the translated message. 4. session_complete → true. Session ends. No navigation.

1. Translate response.message + action_items + disclaimer from English → user's language. 2. Display as bot bubble with action_items list. 3. If hospital_info is present → render HospitalCarousel with those hospitals. 4. If voice mode → TTS speak the translated message. 5. Session ends.

1. setShowEmergency(true) → renders EmergencyBanner. 2. Translate response.message from English → user's language. 3. Display translated message as bot bubble. 4. If voice mode → TTS speak the translated message. 5. Render hospital_info list via HospitalCarousel (data comes from chatbot response — do NOT make a separate hospitals API call). 6. Show TWO action buttons: a. "Call Ambulance" button → triggers handleEmergencyCall() (see below). b. "Send SMS" button → same handleEmergencyCall() (same API handles both). 7. Session ends.

1. Show loading state on button. 2. Reverse-geocode lat/lng via Nominatim → get address string. Fallback: "{lat}, {lng}" if Nominatim fails or lat/lng null. 3. Build name: state.profile.firstName + " " + state.profile.lastName, fallback to state.profile.preferredName. 4. POST to https://muddy-wynn-codeshunt-c2861863.koyeb.app/call/emergency with { name, location: addressString }. 5. On HTTP 2xx → show green success indicator on button, disable button. 6. On failure → show red error indicator, allow retry.

- User input (any language) → translateToEnglish() → sent to chatbot API. - Chatbot response (always English) → translateFromEnglish() → displayed to user. - If lang === 'en', skip translation calls entirely (pass through). - Translate: message, action_items (each item individually), disclaimer. - Do NOT translate: hospital names, addresses, distances, phone numbers. - If translation fails → display English original with no crash.

files_to_change.file: Add "http://localhost:5173" to CORS_ORIGINS if not already present. This is a one-line change.

Export single function: getOrCreatePatientId() - Reads localStorage key "aetrix_patient_id" - If missing, calls crypto.randomUUID(), writes to localStorage, returns it - If present, returns existing value

Replace entire mock implementation with real API integration. Export: sendChatMessage({ user_id, session_id, message, lat, lng }) → Promise<OutputResponse> - POST to http://localhost:8000/api/chat - Throws on non-2xx with structured error object { status, detail } - Returns parsed JSON matching OutputResponse schema

Detailed changes: 1. Import getOrCreatePatientId from patientId.js 2. Import sendChatMessage (real) from chatbotService.js 3. On mount: init patientId, session_id, geolocation 4. Add handleEmergencyCall() function (reverse-geocode + POST to emergency API) 5. Add buildSummaryMessage() helper that constructs English summary from symptomDataRef 6. Replace handleDiagnose() with sendToRealChatbot() that: - calls buildSummaryMessage() - calls sendChatMessage() - routes response by output_type 7. Add free-form reply handler for output_type: query multi-turn loop 8. Add translateAndDisplay() helper: - translates message + action_items + disclaimer - adds bot message bubble - calls speakIfVoiceMode() if voice mode 9. Pass real hospital_info from chatbot response to HospitalCarousel (remove mockHospitals usage) 10. Wire "Call Ambulance" and "Send SMS" buttons to handleEmergencyCall() 11. Session_id: read/write localStorage "aetrix_session_id" 12. Keep ALL existing question flow logic untouched 13. Keep speakIfVoiceMode() untouched

edge_cases.case: Geolocation denied → lat/lng are null → chatbot called without lat/lng → hospital_info will be null → HospitalCarousel not rendered → emergency still works but shows no hospitals
Translation API (MyMemory) fails → catch error → display English original → no crash → log to console
Chatbot API (localhost:8000) unreachable → show user-facing error toast → remove typing indicator → allow retry
Emergency API call fails → show red error state on button → allow retry → do NOT disable button permanently
Nominatim reverse-geocode fails → fallback to "{lat}, {lng}" string for location
Sarvam TTS fails in voice mode → log error → continue silently, message still displayed as text
session_complete: true returned mid-query-flow → stop question flow → show chatbot response → end session
lang === 'en' → skip all translateToEnglish / translateFromEnglish calls entirely
user_id / patient_id is always read from localStorage, never from UserContext (UserContext has no _id field)
action_items is an array → each item translated individually → displayed as numbered list under bot message

constraints.constraint: Do NOT modify voiceUtils.js — all Sarvam functions are already correct
Do NOT modify I18nContext or any i18n files
Do NOT change the QUESTION_FLOW array or the question logic in ChatBot.jsx
Do NOT add any new npm packages — use only what is already installed
Do NOT use axios — use native fetch() only
The chatbot ALWAYS receives English. Never send untranslated non-English text to /api/chat
The user ALWAYS sees their own language. Never display raw English API responses to non-English users
Do NOT call a separate hospitals API — hospital_info comes from the chatbot response directly
Do NOT use any browser storage other than localStorage (no sessionStorage, no cookies)
EmergencyBanner and HospitalCarousel components must NOT be modified — only their props/usage in ChatBot.jsx

prompt.output_format:
Produce the workflow plan in this exact structure:
## INTEGRATION WORKFLOW PLAN
### PHASE 0: Pre-flight (config changes) [List each config change with exact file path and what to change]
### PHASE 1: patientId.js (new file) [Describe exactly what the file exports, the logic, localStorage key]
### PHASE 2: chatbotService.js (full replacement) [Describe the exported function signature, request shape, response shape, error handling strategy]
### PHASE 3: ChatBot.jsx (integration wiring) [Break into numbered sub-steps. For each: what function/hook is added/changed, what it does, what it calls, what state it reads/writes. Be specific about data flow.]
### PHASE 4: Emergency Flow [Full step-by-step of handleEmergencyCall() including reverse-geocode, name building, API call, success/failure UI states]
### PHASE 5: Translation + TTS Pipeline [Describe the translateAndDisplay() helper: inputs, steps, outputs, fallback on error]
### PHASE 6: Edge Case Handling [Map each EC-01 through EC-10 to concrete handling strategy]
### PHASE 7: Testing Checklist [Manual test scenarios the developer should verify after implementation]
--- At the end, add a section: ## QUESTIONS / ASSUMPTIONS List any assumptions made and any clarifications needed from the developer.
